---
title: "AI/ML Foundations and Applications"
description: "From perceptrons to transformers — history, theory, and R implementations of AI and ML."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="ai-ml-foundations-and-applications"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>AI/ML Foundations and Applications</h1>
  <p class="lead">From perceptrons to transformers — history, theory, and R implementations of AI and ML.</p>
</div>
```
